title: cyclophyllum pindaiense
intro: Cyclophyllum pindaiense is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a woody vine native to New Caledonia and has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever and pain. The plant's leaves and bark are used in herbal preparations, which are believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation and acting as an antioxidant. Traditional herbal preparations of Cyclophyllum pindaiense include infusions and decoctions, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
